'''Thak Val Zsing''' was a red-bearded [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. His great-grandfather had been a murderer sent to that world. He was originally a history professor until he lost his job in a government cut of social programs. He was then forced to become a miner. Around [[51 BBY/Legends|51 BBY]], he took command of the terrorist group called [[Desert Wind]]. He enjoyed drinking [[Chandrilan brandy/Legends|Chandrilan brandy]].

He remained a leader of Desert Wind up through the [[Mission to Ord Cestus|Battle of Ord Cestus]] around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. During the final days of that conflict, he suicide-bombed a [[JK-13 security droid|JK-13 combat droid]] using a mine, crippling it. This sacrifice allowed [[Jangotat|CT-96/298]] to destroy the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]] headquarters. At the time of his death he had at least two grandchildren.
